title: Icarus Cobbled Together
description: Icarus Cobbled Together is a carefully curated Cobblemon-based modpack that brings the world of Pokémon into a rich, immersive Minecraft experience.
body:
Icarus Cobbled Together is a carefully curated Cobblemon-based modpack that brings the world of Pokémon into a rich, immersive Minecraft experience.

With a strong focus on Cobblemon and its add-ons, this modpack lets you explore a vibrant world teeming with Pokémon while enhancing every part of your journey — from the way you build to how you fight.

Key Features:
Improved Combat & Mobility
Take battles to the next level with better swordplay, dodge mechanics, and other RPG-inspired features to make you feel like a real Pokémon trainer in the wild.

Building-Focused Enhancements
Build stunning towns, arenas, and Pokémon Centers using expanded block palettes, decor mods, and tools that make designing easier and more satisfying.

Exploration & World Gen
Discover a world filled with new biomes, structures, and dungeons to make your journey exciting beyond just catching ‘em all.

Quality of Life Upgrades
Enjoy a smoother experience with features like minimaps, inventory sorting, performance optimizations, and UI tweaks that remove the grind and keep you immersed.

Cobblemon Add-Ons
Extend the base experience with new Pokémon, items, mechanics, and other content that makes Cobblemon feel deeper and more complete than ever before.

This pack is perfect for:
Players who want a Pokémon + Minecraft survival blend

Builders looking for more blocks and tools to get creative

Adventurers craving a more dynamic, RPG-style world

This pack is mainly for client-side use however only a couple mods would have to be removed to allow it to work server-side
